zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford於1270年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾時，他的父親Sir John de Meisnilhermer33歲，母親Margaret Teyes32歲。他於1297年1月與Countess Joan of Acre結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1325年4月5日在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford于1270年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾时，他的父亲Sir John de Meisnilhermer33岁，母亲Margaret Teyes32岁。他于1297年1月与Countess Joan of Acre结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1325年4月5日在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford was born in 1270, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de Meisnilhermer, was 33 and his mother, Margaret Teyes, was 32. He married Countess Joan of Acre in January 1297. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 5 April 1325, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford est né en 1270, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Meisnilhermer, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Teyes, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Countess Joan of Acre en janvier 1297. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 avril 1325, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford 1270 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Meisnilhermer 33 und seine Mutter Margaret Teyes 32. Er hat im Januar 1297 Countess Joan of Acre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. April 1325 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford è nato il nel 1270 nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John de Meisnilhermer, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Teyes, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Countess Joan of Acre nel gennaio 1297. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 aprile 1325, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertfordが1270年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John de Meisnilhermerは33歳，母Margaret Teyesは32歳であった。1297年1月にCountess Joan of Acreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1325年4月5日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford(이)가 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Meisnilhermer(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Teyes(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1297년 1월 Countess Joan of Acre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1325년 4월 5일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford nasceu em 1270, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Meisnilhermer, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Teyes, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Countess Joan of Acre em janeiro de 1297. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de abril de 1325, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford родился в 1270 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de Meisnilhermer было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Teyes, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Joan of Acre январь 1297 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 5 апреля 1325 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.Between 1297 and 1307: mai le 1297 e o'o I le 1307

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph de Monthermer 1st Earl of Gloucester and Hertford nació en 1270, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Meisnilhermer, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret Teyes, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Countess Joan of Acre en enero de 1297. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de abril de 1325, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
